description: Crafted Intelligence independent prompts — 37 prompts across 6 categories (Barrel Operations, Lot Profitability, Inventory & Supply Chain, Compliance & Audit, MRP Intelligence, Batch & Genealogy)

prompts.name: Barrel Profile Lookup
prompts.prompt_text: Look up barrel [BARREL NUMBER] using the getBarrelProfile tool and give me its full profile. Show me: current status, fill date, age, location (warehouse/bin/rack), cooperage details (cooper, wood type, toast level), and the item it is associated with. If it has been harvested, include the harvest date, harvest volume, and angels share loss. Summarize recent activity (last 5 events) at the bottom.
prompts.description: Full profile for a specific barrel: identity, cooperage, location, status, and recent activity.

steps.purpose: Resolve barrel identity, status, location, cooperage, and recent activity

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: includes proof gallons, angel's share, and TTB fields. Winery: includes varietal, vintage, and appellation fields.
safety_rules: Never fabricate barrel data — all values must come from getBarrelProfile
If barrel not found, suggest using searchItems to find the correct barrel name
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Activity Timeline
prompts.prompt_text: Show me the complete activity history for barrel [BARREL NUMBER]. First call getBarrelProfile to get the barrel context, then call getBarrelActivityHistory for the full timeline. List every event in chronological order with: date, activity type, associated transaction (with document number), and any location or bin changes.
prompts.description: Chronological activity timeline for a specific barrel with transaction links.
safety_rules: If barrel not found, suggest using searchItems first
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Cost Trace
prompts.prompt_text: Trace the complete cost history for barrel [BARREL NUMBER]. First call getBarrelProfile for context, then call getBarrelCostTrace. Show me: the empty barrel acquisition cost, fill costs, every posting transaction in chronological order with running cost balance, and the current total value with cost per proof gallon (distillery) or cost per gallon (winery).
prompts.description: Complete cost waterfall for a barrel from acquisition through all postings.
prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: cost-per-PG, proof gallons. Winery: cost-per-gallon.
safety_rules: Flag barrels with zero cost as data quality issues
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Operations KPI Dashboard
prompts.prompt_text: Give me a barrel operations dashboard for the current year. Include: current inventory totals, period activity (filled vs harvested), angel's share analysis, aging distribution, and status breakdown. Present as a dashboard with KPI cards and detail tables.
prompts.description: Portfolio-level barrel KPI dashboard for the current year.
safety_rules: Flag angel's share above 15% as potential data quality issues
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Aging Distribution
prompts.prompt_text: Show me a barrel aging report grouped by [ITEM / LOCATION / COOPER / WOOD TYPE]. For each group show: barrel count, age distribution buckets, average age, oldest and newest fill dates, total volume and proof gallons. Highlight groups with average age exceeding 4 years.
prompts.description: Aging distribution report grouped by item, location, cooper, or wood type.

steps.purpose: Analyze barrel aging grouped by dimension

safety_rules: Highlight groups exceeding 4 years as harvest candidates
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Inventory Snapshot
prompts.prompt_text: How many barrels do we have right now? Break it down by [STATUS / LOCATION / ITEM / COOPER / BATCH]. For each group show barrel count, total volume, total proof gallons. Show overall status distribution as a summary at the top.
prompts.description: Current barrel counts grouped by any dimension.

steps.purpose: Current barrel counts grouped by dimension

GROUP BY.hint: status, location, item, cooper, or batch

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Portfolio Valuation
prompts.prompt_text: What is our barrel inventory worth? Show the valuation grouped by [ITEM / LOCATION / INDIVIDUAL BARRELS]. For each group: number of barrels, total value, average value per barrel, total proof gallons and value per proof gallon. Show grand total at top.
prompts.description: Financial valuation of the full barrel portfolio by item, location, or individual.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Angels Share Analysis
prompts.prompt_text: Give me an angel's share analysis for barrels harvested in [DATE RANGE]. Show: total barrels with PG data, original vs harvest PG, total PG lost, average angel's share percentage. Break down by harvest age. Flag barrels above 15%.
prompts.description: Angel's share (evaporation loss) analysis for harvested barrels. Distillery only.

steps.purpose: Angel's share data from harvested barrels

prompts.edition_notes: Distillery only — requires proof gallon tracking.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Cooperage Performance Comparison
prompts.prompt_text: Compare our barrels by cooper (manufacturer). For each cooper show: barrel count, aging distribution, average age, total volume and proof gallons. Which coopers do we use most and how does age distribution differ?
prompts.description: Cross-cooper comparison of portfolio size, age, and volume.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Single Barrel Valuation
prompts.prompt_text: What is barrel [BARREL NUMBER] worth? Show current value, cost per unit, cost per proof gallon, fill date, age, status, location. Then trace the cost waterfall: empty barrel cost, fill components, subsequent transactions.
prompts.description: Deep valuation of a single barrel with full cost waterfall.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Barrel Location Map
prompts.prompt_text: Show me where all our barrels are located, grouped by [LOCATION / BIN / RACK]. For each group: barrel count, status breakdown, volume, proof gallons, average age. Also show the 25 most recent movements.
prompts.description: Warehouse distribution of all barrels with recent movement history.

steps.purpose: Barrel distribution across warehouses, bins, racks

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Harvest-Ready Barrels
prompts.prompt_text: Which barrels are ready to harvest? Show all barrels in Ready to Harvest status grouped by item. For each: barrel number, age, location, volume, proof gallons, value. Aggregate totals. Highlight barrels over 8 years old.
prompts.description: Barrels in Ready to Harvest status with aggregate totals and over-age highlights.

steps.purpose: Barrels in Ready to Harvest status

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Lot Profitability Summary
prompts.prompt_text: Give me a profitability summary for lot [LOT NUMBER]. Use searchItems to find the item, then call getLotProfitability. Show: revenue, COGS, gross margin, gross margin percentage, cost breakdown by category. If multiple sales, break down revenue by customer.
prompts.description: P&L summary for a specific lot with revenue, COGS, and margin by customer.
safety_rules: Never fabricate cost or revenue figures
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Lot Cost Tree
prompts.prompt_text: Trace the full cost tree for lot [LOT NUMBER]. Show the backward recursive trace: lot to work order to components to sub-assemblies to purchase orders. Include GL cross-validation. Flag cost-of-sales adjustments or zero-cost components.
prompts.description: Recursive backward cost trace from lot to raw materials with GL validation.

steps.purpose: Recursive backward cost trace with GL validation

safety_rules: Flag Cost of Sales Adjustment memos
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Lot Sales Trail
prompts.prompt_text: Show me the sales trail for lot [LOT NUMBER]. Trace forward from the lot to shipments, invoices, credit memos, and returns. Show each transaction with date, document number, customer, quantity, and amount.
prompts.description: Forward revenue trail: lot to shipments, invoices, and returns by customer.

steps.purpose: Forward revenue trace: lot to shipment to invoice

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Lot Yield Analysis
prompts.prompt_text: Analyze manufacturing yield for lot [LOT NUMBER]. Show: planned vs actual quantities, yield percentage, scrap quantities and cost, OEE metrics, per-operation task details.
prompts.description: Manufacturing yield and OEE for a production lot.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Lot Cost Variance
prompts.prompt_text: Show cost variance for lot [LOT NUMBER]. Compare BOM planned cost vs actual cost by component. Highlight variances exceeding 10%.
prompts.description: BOM planned-vs-actual cost variance by component for a lot.

steps.purpose: BOM planned vs actual cost comparison

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Item Cost Trend
prompts.prompt_text: Show cost trend for item [ITEM NAME] over time. Plot cost-per-unit across all lots, showing how production costs have changed. Highlight significant spikes or drops.
prompts.description: Historical cost-per-unit trend for an item across all production lots.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Item Intelligence Report
prompts.prompt_text: Give me a full intelligence report on item [ITEM NAME]. Use searchItems to find it, then call getItemIntelligence for the complete picture: position, aging, supply/demand, flags, recommendations. Follow recommended deep dives.
prompts.description: Meta-orchestrator report: position, aging, supply/demand, flags, and deep-dive recommendations.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Inventory Snapshot
prompts.prompt_text: Show current inventory for item [ITEM NAME]. Break down by location with on-hand, available, committed, on-order, lot detail with expiration dates, and bin locations.
prompts.description: Current stock by location with lot and bin detail.

steps.purpose: Current stock by location with lot/bin detail

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Inventory Aging Report
prompts.prompt_text: Show inventory aging for item [ITEM NAME]. For each lot: lot number, receipt date, age, quantity, expiration date, days until expiration, days of supply. Flag expired lots and those expiring within 30 days.
prompts.description: Lot-level aging with expiration risk and days of supply.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Inventory Alerts
prompts.prompt_text: What inventory alerts do we have? Scan for stockouts, negative inventory, expired lots, lots expiring within 30 days, and zero-cost items. Show each alert with item, location, severity, and recommended action.
prompts.description: Cross-item alerts scanner: stockouts, negatives, expired lots, zero-cost items.

steps.purpose: Cross-item scanner for stockouts, expired lots, zero-cost

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Costed Bill of Materials
prompts.prompt_text: Explode the BOM for item [ITEM NAME] with full costed breakdown. All levels, component quantities, unit costs, extended costs, yield factors, routing costs. Total unit cost with breakdown by category.
prompts.description: Full multi-level costed BOM explosion with routing.

steps.purpose: Multi-level BOM explosion with cost waterfall

safety_rules: Never fabricate BOM or cost data
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Production Cost Variance
prompts.prompt_text: Show production cost variance for item [ITEM NAME]. Compare planned BOM cost vs actual from Assembly Builds. Break down variance by component.
prompts.description: Planned BOM cost vs actual production cost variance.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Compliance Readiness Score
prompts.prompt_text: What is our compliance readiness score? Run a composite assessment: period close status, TTB filing gaps, data quality issues, inventory integrity. Show overall score (0-100) with breakdown and specific issues to address.
prompts.description: Composite compliance readiness scorecard (0-100) with breakdown and remediation.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: TTB Filing Status
prompts.prompt_text: Check our TTB filing status. Any unfiled reports? Show each filing period, filed status, due date, and gaps. Compare filed records against active licenses.
prompts.description: TTB filing status with gap detection against active licenses.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Gain/Loss Analysis
prompts.prompt_text: Show gain/loss analysis for [DATE RANGE]. PG/LAL trending with dual-percentage analysis, per-item breakdowns, period aggregation. Flag entries above 5% threshold.
prompts.description: PG/LAL gain/loss trending for a date range. Distillery only.
prompts.edition_notes: Distillery: uses proof gallons and LAL.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Data Quality Audit
prompts.prompt_text: Run a data quality audit. Check for items missing proof/ABV, missing reporting category, missing excise accounts, and other compliance-critical fields.
prompts.description: Item setup data quality audit for compliance-critical fields.

steps.purpose: Item setup and transaction data quality validation

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Accounting Anomalies
prompts.prompt_text: Scan for accounting anomalies in [DATE RANGE]. Look for COGS adjustments, WIP variance, inventory adjustments hitting COGS, and period trending.
prompts.description: COGS/WIP anomaly scan with period trending.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Transaction Audit Trail
prompts.prompt_text: Show the complete audit trail for transaction [TRANSACTION ID]. Include system notes (field changes with who/when/old/new), line detail, and GL accounting lines.
prompts.description: Full audit trail: system notes, line detail, and GL accounting for a transaction.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: MRP Supply/Demand Analysis
prompts.prompt_text: Run MRP supply/demand analysis for item [ITEM NAME]. Show time-phased PAB with: on-hand, scheduled receipts, gross requirements, net requirements. Factor in lot expirations — show adjusted available supply.
prompts.description: Time-phased Projected Available Balance with lot expiration netting.

steps.purpose: Time-phased PAB with lot expiration netting

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: MRP Action Messages
prompts.prompt_text: What MRP action messages do we have? Show planning recommendations: orders to create, reschedule, cancel, expedite. Group by priority with item, quantity, and recommended date.
prompts.description: MRP action message queue grouped by priority.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: MRP Setup Audit
prompts.prompt_text: Audit our MRP setup. Check item planning parameters: lead times, safety stock, lot sizing, reorder points, time fences. Flag items with missing or incorrect parameters.
prompts.description: Item planning parameter audit: lead times, safety stock, lot sizing, reorder points.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Shelf Life MRP
prompts.prompt_text: Run shelf-life-aware MRP for item [ITEM NAME]. How many units expire in the next 30/60/90 days? What is true usable supply vs what NetSuite MRP reports?
prompts.description: Shelf-life-aware supply analysis: true usable supply vs what NetSuite MRP reports.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Batch Genealogy Trace
prompts.prompt_text: Trace the complete genealogy of batch [BATCH NAME]. Show every cellar order where this batch appears — as input, output, or both. Include CO details, input/output lines, varietals, vintages, appellations, additives, and native transactions. Show compositions for all related batches.
prompts.description: Complete batch genealogy across cellar orders. Winery edition.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Batch Details
prompts.prompt_text: Look up batch [BATCH NAME]. Show: current volume, status, tank assignment, item, varietal, vintage, appellation, and lab metrics if available.
prompts.description: Batch composition snapshot: volume, status, tank, varietal, lab metrics.

steps.purpose: Batch composition with volume, status, tank, varietal

prompts.author: Doozy Labs

prompts.name: Batch Lineage Chain
prompts.prompt_text: Trace the full lineage chain for batch [BATCH NAME]. Show upstream sources and downstream consumers. Expand recursively for grape-to-glass or glass-to-grape path.
prompts.description: Recursive batch lineage: upstream sources and downstream consumers.
prompts.author: Doozy Labs
